name: Frittata Ranchera
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a skillet. Sauté the chopped onion and green bell pepper until tender.
2. Add the cubed cooked ham and beans to the skillet. Stir everything together and heat through.
3. Remove the bean mixture from the skillet and set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together the eggs and water.
5. Heat the remaining tablespoon of butter in the skillet until it just begins to sizzle.
6. Pour the beaten egg mixture into the skillet over the cooled bean mixture.
7. Cook over low heat until the eggs are set, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Transfer the skillet to a warm oven (optional) and continue cooking until the eggs reach your desired doneness.
9. Use a sharp knife to cut the frittata into wedges for serving. Serves 4-6
